title: Add paginated product catalog service with input validation
author: eval-bot

context_units.diff_patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+from dataclasses import dataclass
+from typing import Optional
+
+from app.repositories.product_repo import ProductRepository
+
+
+@dataclass
+class ProductPage:
+    items: list[dict]
+    total: int
+    page: int
+    page_size: int
+
+
+class CatalogService:
+    def __init__(self, repo: ProductRepository) -> None:
+        self._repo = repo
+
+    def list_products(
+        self,
+        category: Optional[str] = None,
+        page: int = 1,
+        page_size: int = 20,
+    ) -> ProductPage:
+        if page < 1:
+            raise ValueError("page must be >= 1")
+        if not 1 <= page_size <= 100:
+            raise ValueError("page_size must be between 1 and 100")
+        offset = (page - 1) * page_size
+        items, total = self._repo.find(
+            category=category,
+            offset=offset,
+            limit=page_size,
+        )
+        return ProductPage(
+            items=[i.to_dict() for i in items],
+            total=total,
+            page=page,
+            page_size=page_size,
+        )
